explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while vitamins are the biggest drag. It lands in B tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in B tier with an overall score of 62 from a base nutrition score of 62. Context barely changed the result.

topPros.title: useful staple energy source
topPros.explanation: That matters because grains are often judged by how practical they are in real diets.

topPros.title: works as a meal anchor
topPros.explanation: A lot of value comes from being easy to build around.

topCons.title: protein quality is limited
topCons.explanation: Even the better grains usually need pairing.

topCons.title: carb load is still the main burden
topCons.explanation: That is the category risk no grain fully escapes.

topCons.title: quality can drop fast with processing
topCons.explanation: The grain category punishes refinement pretty hard.
